title: Pica's Stone Body Appears
description: Pages 1–5 focus on pica's stone body appears, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Luffy, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as pica's giant stone body reshapes Dressrosa, scattering the fighters and forcing Luffy's group to race toward Doflamingo.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahaha!!! What a weird voice!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Someone knows it

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Whoa, whoa, straw hat, stop!! Pica-sama is super touchy about his high voice!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: If he goes wild in that form....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Run for it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Who can call that a punch?! It's like a whole town falling on top of us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I feel a rather terrible presence...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ISSHOU- San!! You have to run! There's a stone giant!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Luffy!! Is this really the time to be provoking the... *Pffft!!*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: See, you're laughing as well!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You people .......!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Here it comes!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: AaaG- hhhh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Uwaaa- AH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Huff

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: "Plaze" outside the Colosseum.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: URG- hhh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: We flew quite a way, huh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Where are we now?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: He's so big he makes even oars look tiny...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Ughhh... damn that rock-fu- soon guy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: If only we knew a way of actually beating him...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Straw hat!!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: Cabbage!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: You must be "pirate Hunter zero"...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: The hell is this guy?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: The scheme is not

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Tra- FAL...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: ...GAR (LAAA- AAW!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Ahhhh!! stop!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Give me back my popularity, you "terrible Generation" dog!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: What are you doing?! He's one of my crew now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: I am not!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: What, have you still got a grudge against me?!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ...No, I will no longer target the straw hat pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: After all, your crew member "God usopp"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: ...was response-ble for saving my very life.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: I will NEVER forget his heroin...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Though I did not see it myself.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: It's pretty nice hearing compliments about my crew!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: ...ah, yes... Trafalgar. This is...your hat, is it not?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: I found it lying outside the colos- seum...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Why don't I put it back on you? Stick your head out now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: You just want to chop it off!!

summary: Pica's Stone Body Appears develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Luffy, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
